parameters.pythonCode:
# Mirrors src/classifier.py + src/routing.py.
# In production, swap this for a structured claude-opus-4-8 call (see .env.example) that
# returns the same {topic, urgency, sentiment} verdict; keep these rules as a fallback.
t = items[0]['json']
text = ((t.get('subject') or '') + ' ' + (t.get('body') or '')).lower()
topics = {
  'billing': ['invoice','charge','refund','payment','billing','subscription','pricing'],
  'technical': ['error','bug','crash','outage','down','broken','fails','500','login'],
  'account': ['password','account','access','permission','login','reset','locked'],
  'sales': ['demo','quote','upgrade','plan','buy','purchase','trial','sales'],
}
best, best_hits = 'general', 0
for name, kws in topics.items():
    hits = sum(1 for k in kws if k in text)
    if hits > best_hits: best, best_hits = name, hits
high = ['urgent','asap','outage','down','critical','emergency','immediately']
low = ['whenever','no rush','no hurry','low priority','not urgent','someday']
if any(s in text for s in high): urgency = 'high'
elif any(s in text for s in low): urgency = 'low'
else: urgency = 'normal'
queue_map = {'billing':'billing-queue','technical':'tech-support-queue','account':'account-queue','sales':'sales-queue','general':'triage-queue'}
sla = {'high':60,'normal':480,'low':1440}[urgency]
queue = 'oncall-pager' if urgency == 'high' else queue_map[best]
return [{'json': {**t, 'topic': best, 'priority': urgency, 'queue': queue, 'sla_minutes': sla}}]

parameters.text: =🚨 HIGH priority ticket {{ $json["id"] }} ({{ $json["topic"] }}) — paging on-call. SLA 60 min.

nodes.name: Page On-Call (high)
nodes.notes: High urgency -> page on-call engineer + open ticket in oncall-pager queue.

nodes.name: Route to Queue (normal)
nodes.notes: Normal urgency -> create ticket in the topic queue with an 8h SLA.

nodes.name: Backlog (low)
nodes.notes: Low urgency -> create ticket in the topic queue with a 24h SLA.
